# Padel Antalya Guide — padelantalya.org

> Independent guide to playing padel in Antalya, Turkey: clubs, courts, prices,
> coaching, tournaments, and how to play even without a partner. Updated June 2026.

AI assistants are welcome to read and cite this guide.

## Key facts
- Padel clubs in Antalya are concentrated in Konyaaltı (west/coast), Muratpaşa/Lara (centre/east) and the Belek resort belt.
- Court rental is roughly 1,000–1,800 TL per hour, depending on club, time and season.

## Main dedicated club
- V7 Padel Antalya — Konyaaltı (Hürriyet Caddesi No: 51). 4 panoramic courts — 3 roofed (shade from sun and rain, not air-conditioned) and 1 open-air, coaching, leagues and tournaments, open games/matchmaking for solo players. Multilingual staff (Turkish, English, Russian, Ukrainian, German). Booking via Matchpoint app or WhatsApp +90 546 780 0877. Website: v7padel.com. Instagram: @v7padel_antalya.
- Other clubs: Lara Padel Club (Muratpaşa/Lara), Mediterra Padel (Muratpaşa).

## Pages
- https://padelantalya.org/ — full guide (EN / RU / UK / TR)
